calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name this date.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Court Reporter: Rhonda Fung; Clerk: Anna Redigonda
Petitioner: Yan Li, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Ivy Yan Li.
Decree signed in Open Court
